summary: Frontend testing completed for 7 new pages implementing UI for existing backend APIs. All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes, translations (DE/EN/SQ), and interactive features working as expected.

VoucherAuctionsPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='voucher-auctions-page'. Shows 4 demo voucher cards (Amazon, MediaMarkt, Lieferando, Netflix) with savings %, prices, time left. Category filters (Alle, Shopping, Essen, Technik, Unterhaltung) work correctly. 'How it works' section displays 3 steps.

AIAdvisorPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='ai-advisor-page'. Budget slider (5-100 bids) works correctly. Hot Tips section shows auctions with win chance %. Auction selection section loads active auctions. AI analysis placeholder shown when no auction selected.

SocialBettingPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='social-betting-page'. Shows BidCoins balance (1,000). Tabs (Meine Wetten, Wette platzieren, Rangliste) work correctly. Bet amount selector (10-500) visible. Daily bonus button present. 'How it works' section shows 3 steps.

BidAlarmPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='bid-alarm-page'. 'Alarm erstellen' button expands form with time presets (10 Sek, 30 Sek, 1 Min, 2 Min). Auction selection list loads. Sound toggle (Ton an/aus) present. Active alarms section shows empty state correctly.

GiftCardsPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='gift-cards-page'. Tabs (Geschenk senden, Meine Karten, Erhaltene Geschenke) work. Package selection (10-250 Gebote) with prices. Gift design selector (Allgemein, Geburtstag, Weihnachten, Dankeschön). Live preview card updates with selection. Recipient email and message fields present.

FriendBattlesPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='friend-battles-page'. 'Battle erstellen' and 'Battle beitreten' buttons present. Tabs (Meine Battles, Einladungen) work. Rules section shows 3 steps. Empty state shows 'Noch keine Battles' with CTA.

TeamBiddingPage.details: Page loads with data-testid='team-bidding-page'. Tabs (Mein Team, Team-Rangliste) work. 'Team erstellen' button expands form with team name input. 'Team beitreten' option available. Bonus rewards section shows 1st/2nd/3rd place prizes. 'How it works' section shows 3 steps.

interactive_tests.VoucherAuctions_CategoryFilter: PASS - Technik filter clicked, Alle reset works
interactive_tests.AIAdvisor_BudgetSlider: PASS - Slider value changed from 10 to 50
interactive_tests.SocialBetting_TabNavigation: PASS - All 3 tabs clickable and switch content
interactive_tests.BidAlarm_CreateForm: PASS - Form expands with time presets and auction list
interactive_tests.TeamBidding_CreateTeam: PASS - Form expands with team name input field

critical_code_review_comments: All pages properly use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
All pages support 3 languages (de, en, sq) with complete translations
Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
VoucherAuctionsPage uses demo voucher data as fallback when no real vouchers exist (MOCKED)

mocked_apis_list: VoucherAuctionsPage - uses demo voucher data (Amazon €50, MediaMarkt €100, Lieferando €25, Netflix 3-Monats) when no real vouchers exist

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new frontend pages are working correctly. Public pages: VoucherAuctionsPage (/gutscheine), AIAdvisorPage (/ki-berater). Protected pages (require login): SocialBettingPage (/betting), BidAlarmPage (/alarm), GiftCardsPage (/gift-cards), FriendBattlesPage (/friend-battles), TeamBiddingPage (/team-bidding). All pages have proper data-testid attributes and support German, English, and Albanian translations.
